/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/idlc.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/plugin.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/options.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/generator.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/descriptor.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/types.c.o CMakeFiles/idlc.dir/src/descriptor_type_meta.c.o  -o ../../../bin/idlc  -Wl,-rpath,/home/unitree/unitree_sdk2_python_go2/.deps/cyclonedds/build/lib: ../../../lib/libcycloneddsidl.so.0.10.5 ../../../lib/libidlpp.a ../../../lib/libddsc.so.0.10.5 -ldl
